properties.description: UI-only 'Reset panel when changing effects' checkbox, NOT serialized. Persisted to wxConfig under xLightsResetBufferPanel by the subclass.

properties.label: Render Style
properties.description: How the model's node layout is projected into a 2D pixel buffer. Populated dynamically from the model's supported styles.

properties.label: Buffer Stagger
properties.description: Percent offset applied to effect start time across nodes for a cascading appearance.

properties.label: Camera
properties.description: Camera to project the model through when BufferStyle is 'Per Preview'. Populated at runtime from 3D cameras in the preview setup.

properties.label: Transformation
properties.description: Fixed geometric transform applied to the buffer coordinate system before the effect renders.

properties.label: Blur
properties.description: Gaussian blur radius applied to the rendered buffer.
When enabled, the buffer is not cleared between frames — each frame composites onto the previous one.

Interactive sub-buffer rectangle picker (SubBufferPanel widget). Serialized as B_CUSTOM_SubBuffer. Built by the subclass because the widget instance is reused for live preview. 'growable: true' makes its tab-page row stretch to fill remaining vertical space, matching the legacy BufferPanel layout where the preview absorbed all available height.

Roto-Zoom preset dropdown: blank (idle), 'None - Reset', '1 Rev CW', '1 Rev CCW', 'Explode', 'Collapse', 'Explode + Spin CW', 'Shake', 'Spin CW Accelerate'. Blank is the resting state so the user can actively select 'None - Reset' to trigger a reset. NOT serialized — applies preset values to other sliders and resets selection to blank. UI-only.

properties.label: Z Rotation
properties.description: Static Z-axis rotation as a 0-100 percentage of a full turn (RZ_ROTATION_MAX). 100 = 360 degrees.

properties.label: Z Rotations
properties.description: Number of full Z-axis rotations over the effect duration. Stored as int; the engine divides by 10. settingPrefix:SLIDER because PixelBuffer reads SLIDER_Rotations as raw int and divides itself.

properties.label: Z Pivot Point X
properties.description: X coordinate of the Z-rotation pivot as a percentage of buffer width.

properties.label: Z Pivot Point Y
properties.description: Y coordinate of the Z-rotation pivot as a percentage of buffer height.

properties.label: Zoom
properties.description: Buffer zoom factor. Stored with divisor 10; 10 = 1.0x (no zoom), max 30 = 3.0x. settingPrefix:SLIDER because PixelBuffer reads SLIDER_Zoom as raw int and divides itself.

properties.label: Zoom Quality
properties.description: Number of interpolation samples used when zooming.

properties.label: X Rotation
properties.description: Fixed rotation around the X axis in degrees.

properties.label: X Pivot Point
properties.description: Pivot coordinate for X-axis rotation.

properties.label: Y Rotation
properties.description: Fixed rotation around the Y axis in degrees.

properties.label: Y Pivot Point
properties.description: Pivot coordinate for Y-axis rotation.

properties.label: Application Order
properties.description: Order in which X, Y, and Z rotations compose when any 3D rotation is non-zero.

notes: BufferStyle is populated dynamically from the model's GetBufferStyles() via BufferPanel::UpdateBufferStyles; the JSON options list is just a fallback for when no model is selected.
PerPreviewCamera is populated from xLightsFrame::viewpoint_mgr when BufferStyle is 'Per Preview' or 'Per Model Per Preview'; disabled otherwise. Repopulation happens in BufferPanel::UpdateCamera.
BufferStagger is only meaningful for stacked ModelGroup buffer styles ('Horizontal Stack' / 'Vertical Stack'); ValidateWindow disables it for other styles.
Z Rotation is 0-100 (percentage of turn) while X/Y Rotation are 0-360 degrees — this asymmetry is intentional and preserved from the legacy panel.
SLIDER_Zoom and SLIDER_Rotations are stored with divisor 10: the UI shows 1.0x / 0.0 rotations while the int value is 10 / 0.
The Roto-Zoom preset dropdown is NOT serialized — selecting an entry writes preset values into the other Roto-Zoom sliders and VCs, then resets itself to blank. Handled as a subclass custom.
SubBufferPanel is a live-preview rectangle editor; serialized as B_CUSTOM_SubBuffer with a compact 'x1 y1 x2 y2' string.
